file.name: Open-webui
file.body: services: open-webui: command: - "bash" - "start.sh" container_name: "open-webui" environment: - "OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://ollama:11434" - "MODEL_NAME=llama" - "WEBUI_SECRET_KEY=" - "PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin" - "LANG=C.UTF-8" - "GPG_KEY=A035C8C19219BA821ECEA86B64E628F8D684696D" - "PYTHON_VERSION=3.11.10" - "PYTHON_SHA256=07a4356e912900e61a15cb0949a06c4a05012e213ecd6b4e84d0f67aabbee372" - "ENV=prod" - "PORT=8080" - "USE_OLLAMA_DOCKER=false" - "USE_CUDA_DOCKER=false" - "USE_CUDA_DOCKER_VER=cu121" - "USE_EMBEDDING_MODEL_DOCKER=sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2" - "USE_RERANKING_MODEL_DOCKER=" - "OPENAI_API_BASE_URL=" - "OPENAI_API_KEY=" - "SCARF_NO_ANALYTICS=true" - "DO_NOT_TRACK=true" - "ANONYMIZED_TELEMETRY=false" - "WHISPER_MODEL=base" - "WHISPER_MODEL_DIR=/app/backend/data/cache/whisper/models" - "RAG_EMBEDDING_MODEL=sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2" - "RAG_RERANKING_MODEL=" - "SENTENCE_TRANSFORMERS_HOME=/app/backend/data/cache/embedding/models" - "TIKTOKEN_ENCODING_NAME=cl100k_base" - "TIKTOKEN_CACHE_DIR=/app/backend/data/cache/tiktoken" - "HF_HOME=/app/backend/data/cache/embedding/models" - "HOME=/root" - "WEBUI_BUILD_VERSION=96c865404d36637eafadb6d2dd2365c85d452648" - "DOCKER=true" extra_hosts: - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway" hostname: "b3343e912475" image: "ghcr.io/open-webui/open-webui:main" ipc: "private" labels: com.docker.compose.config-hash: "ad26aaba70785e9ac3aead13f3f3f43d7bd1396fe4002e576ce4f37804e1c14d" com.docker.compose.container-number: "1" com.docker.compose.depends_on: "ollama:service_started:false" com.docker.compose.image: "sha256:c679b003c176ddbae5dd1b16aee3c63bea88d6f52d98befc576f4257c566be54" com.docker.compose.oneoff: "False" com.docker.compose.project: "open-webui" com.docker.compose.project.config_files: "/srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/compose/open-webui/docker-compose.yaml" com.docker.compose.project.working_dir: "/srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/compose/open-webui" com.docker.compose.service: "open-webui" com.docker.compose.version: "2.29.7" org.opencontainers.image.created: "2024-11-10T02:01:57.685Z" org.opencontainers.image.description: "User-friendly AI Interface (Supports\ \ Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)" org.opencontainers.image.licenses: "MIT" org.opencontainers.image.revision: "96c865404d36637eafadb6d2dd2365c85d452648" org.opencontainers.image.source: "https://github.com/open-webui/open-webui" org.opencontainers.image.title: "open-webui" org.opencontainers.image.url: "https://github.com/open-webui/open-webui" org.opencontainers.image.version: "main" logging: driver: "json-file" options: {} networks: - "open-webui_default" dns: - 192.168.1.154 ports: - "3000:8080/tcp" restart: "unless-stopped" user: "0:0" volumes: - "/srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/open-webui/data:/app/backend/data" working_dir: "/app/backend" networks: open-webui_default: external: true name: "open-webui_default"

file.name: ollama
file.body: services: ollama: command: - "serve" container_name: "ollama" entrypoint: - "/bin/ollama" environment: - "PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin" - "OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0:11434" - "LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/local/nvidia/lib:/usr/local/nvidia/lib64" - "NVIDIA_DRIVER_CAPABILITIES=compute,utility" - "NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=all" ports: - "11434/tcp" hostname: "e12e94caacf6" dns: - 192.168.1.154 image: "ollama/ollama:latest" ipc: "private" labels: com.docker.compose.config-hash: "75eb955bfef3162436e85f1a810ae060bacbec095db330888a2da1377357ab53" com.docker.compose.container-number: "1" com.docker.compose.depends_on: "" com.docker.compose.image: "sha256:6970c6ac674bad6accf69e944a62555948d91019917a3fcf9cdbbe4647a21a36" com.docker.compose.oneoff: "False" com.docker.compose.project: "open-webui" com.docker.compose.project.config_files: "/srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/compose/open-webui/docker-compose.yaml" com.docker.compose.project.working_dir: "/srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/compose/open-webui" com.docker.compose.service: "ollama" com.docker.compose.version: "2.29.7" org.opencontainers.image.ref.name: "ubuntu" org.opencontainers.image.version: "22.04" logging: driver: "json-file" options: {} networks: - "open-webui_default" restart: "unless-stopped" tty: true volumes: - "/srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/ollama:/root/.ollama" networks: open-webui_default: external: true name: "open-webui_default"

homepage: image: ghcr.io/gethomepage/homepage:latest container_name: homepage dns: - 192.168.1.154 ports: - 3001:3000 volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/homepage:/app/config - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3:/srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3 user: "1000:990" # Replace 101 with your actual docker GID environment: # - PUID=1000 # - PGID=990 # Must match your docker group ID - TZ=America/New_York - HOMEPAGE_ALLOWED_HOSTS=* - HOMEPAGE_CONFIG_LOCK=false - HOMEPAGE_LOG_LEVEL=debug restart: unless-stopped

file.name: nginx-proxy-manager
file.body:
services: app: image: 'jc21/nginx-proxy-manager:latest' restart: unless-stopped ports: - '80:80' - '443:443' - '81:81' volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/nginxproxymanager/data:/data - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/nginxproxymanager/letsencrypt:/etc/letsencrypt environment: - TZ=America/New_York depends_on: - db dns: - 1.1.1.1 networks: - authelia_net
db: image: 'jc21/mariadb-aria:latest' restart: unless-stopped volumes: - //srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/nginxproxymanager/mysql:/var/lib/mysql
networks: authelia_net: external: true #### # # Default Administrator User login: # Email: admin@example.com # Password: changeme # ####
file.env: ### # Nginx Proxy Manager variables ### TZ=Europe/Berlin #### # # Mysql/Maria connection parameters: # If you run a DB-Server already, you should know how to connect to your server # #### DB_MYSQL_HOST: "db" DB_MYSQL_PORT: 3306 DB_MYSQL_USER: "npm" DB_MYSQL_PASSWORD: "npm" DB_MYSQL_NAME: "npm" # Uncomment this if IPv6 is not enabled on your host # DISABLE_IPV6: 'true' #### # # Mysql/Maria DB setup variables. # Not needed if you run a DB-Server already, you should know, how to setup a new database # #### MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: 'npm' MYSQL_DATABASE: 'npm' MYSQL_USER: 'npm' MYSQL_PASSWORD: 'npm'

file.body: services: speedtest-tracker: image: lscr.io/linuxserver/speedtest-tracker:latest restart: unless-stopped container_name: speedtest-tracker dns: - 192.168.1.154 ports: - 7070:80 env_file: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/compose/.secrets.env environment: - PUID=1000 - PGID=100 - TZ=America/New_York - DB_CONNECTION=sqlite - SPEEDTEST_SERVER_ID=28307 - SPEEDTEST_SCHEDULE=0 */12 * * * - MAIL_MAILER=smtp - MAIL_HOST=mail.heyzeus.org - MAIL_PORT=465 - MAIL_USERNAME=omv-server@heyzeus.org - MAIL_ENCRYPTION=tls - MAIL_FROM_ADDRESS=omv-server@heyzeus.org - MAIL_FROM_NAME="Speedtest Tracker" volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/speedtest:/config

file.name: authelia
file.body: services: authelia: container_name: authelia image: docker.io/authelia/authelia:latest restart: unless-stopped #environment: # AUTHELIA_IDENTITY_VALIDATION_RESET_PASSWORD_JWT_SECRET_FILE: '/secrets/JWT_SECRET' # AUTHELIA_SESSION_SECRET_FILE: '/secrets/SESSION_SECRET' # AUTHELIA_STORAGE_POSTGRES_PASSWORD_FILE: '/secrets/STORAGE_PASSWORD' # AUTHELIA_STORAGE_ENCRYPTION_KEY_FILE: '/secrets/STORAGE_ENCRYPTION_KEY' ports: - 9091:9091 dns: - 192.168.1.154 volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/authelia/config:/config/ # - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/authelia/secrets:/secrets/ environment: - TZ=America/New_York networks: - authelia_net #net: # aliases: [authelia_net] networks: authelia_net: external: true # net: # external: true # name: 'authelia_net'

file.name: calibre-web
file.body: --- networks: my-net: external: true internal-net: driver: bridge services: calibre-web: image: lscr.io/linuxserver/calibre-web:latest container_name: calibre-web environment: - PUID=1000 - PGID=100 - TZ=America/New_York - DOCKER_MODS=ghcr.io/linuxserver/mods:universal-calibre #optional # - OAUTHLIB_RELAX_TOKEN_SCOPE=1 #optional volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/calibre-web:/config - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/media/lazylibrarian/books:/books dns: - 192.168.1.154 ports: - 8083:8083 restart: unless-stopped

file.name: lazylibrarian
file.body: --- services: lazylibrarian: image: lscr.io/linuxserver/lazylibrarian:latest container_name: lazylibrarian environment: - PUID=1000 - PGID=100 - TZ=America/New_York - DOCKER_MODS=linuxserver/mods:universal-calibre|linuxserver/mods:lazylibrarian-ffmpeg #optional volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/lazylibrarian/data:/config - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/downloads/:/downloads - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/media/lazylibrarian/books:/books #optional dns: - 8.8.8.8 ports: - 5299:5299 restart: unless-stopped

file.name: calibre
file.body: services: calibre: image: lscr.io/linuxserver/calibre:latest container_name: calibre environment: - PUID=1000 - PGID=100 - TZ=America/New_York volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/calibre:/config - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/media/lazylibrarian/books:/books dns: - 192.168.1.154 ports: #- 8080:8080 # Calibre Content Server (optional) - 8081:8081 # noVNC Web GUI for Calibre desktop restart: unless-stopped

file.name: Wallos
file.body: services: wallos: container_name: wallos image: bellamy/wallos:latest ports: - "8282:80/tcp" environment: TZ: 'America/New_York' networks: - media-net dns: - 192.168.1.154 # Volumes store your data between container upgrades volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/wallos/db:/var/www/html/db - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/wallos/logos:/var/www/html/images/uploads/logos restart: unless-stopped networks: media-net: external: true

file.name: beszel
file.body: --- services: beszel: image: henrygd/beszel container_name: beszel environment: - TZ=America/New_York ports: - 8091:8090 volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/beszel/config:/beszel_data dns: - 192.168.1.154 restart: unless-stopped

file.name: beszel-agent
file.body: services: beszel-agent: image: "henrygd/beszel-agent" container_name: "beszel-agent" restart: unless-stopped network_mode: host volumes: - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro # monitor other disks / partitions by mounting a folder in /extra-filesystems - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/:/extra-filesystems/srv:ro environment: LISTEN: 45876 KEY: "ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAILHJgGJpH4Z0l0M/VpsLPyZACHTduG2WeuXRuSYQWYGJ"

file.name: nzbget
file.body: --- services: nzbget: image: lscr.io/linuxserver/nzbget:latest container_name: nzbget environment: - PUID=1000 - PGID=100 - TZ=America/New_York - NZBGET_CONTROL_USERNAME= - NZBGET_CONTROL_PASSWORD= dns: - 192.168.1.154 volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/nzbget/config:/config - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/downloads:/GeneralDownloads - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/media/sabnzbd/incomplete:/incomplete-download - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/media/plex/multimedia/movies:/Plexmovies #optional - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/media/plex/multimedia/tvshows:/Plextvshows #optional - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/media/lazylibrarian/books:/books #optional ports: - 6789:6789 restart: unless-stopped

file.name: glances
file.body: services: glances: image: nicolargo/glances:latest-full container_name: glances pid: host network_mode: host volumes: - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro - /proc:/host/proc:ro - /sys:/host/sys:ro - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/glances/config:/glances/conf dns: - 192.168.1.154 environment: - "GLANCES_OPT=-w" - TZ=America/New_York restart: unless-stopped

file.name: litellm
file.body:
services: litellm: image: ghcr.io/berriai/litellm:v1.83.10-nightly dns: - 192.168.1.154 restart: unless-stopped depends_on: - litellm-db env_file: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/compose/.secrets.env environment: - UI_USERNAME=zeus - STORE_MODEL_IN_DB=True ports: - "4000:4000"
litellm-db: image: postgres:16-alpine dns: - 192.168.1.154 healthcheck: test: - CMD-SHELL - pg_isready -U litellmdb_user -d litellm_db interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5 volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/litellm-db:/var/lib/postgresql/data:rw env_file: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/compose/.secrets.env restart: unless-stopped

file.name: z-wave-js-ui
file.body: services: zwave-js-ui: container_name: zwave-js-ui image: zwavejs/zwave-js-ui:latest restart: always tty: true stop_signal: SIGINT env_file: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/compose/.secrets.env environment: - TZ=America/New_York networks: - zwave devices: - /dev/serial/by-id/usb-Silicon_Labs_CP2105_Dual_USB_to_UART_Bridge_Controller_01702DFE-if01-port0:/dev/ttyZWave volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/zwave-js-ui/store:/usr/src/app/store ports: - '8092:8091' - '3002:3002' networks: zwave: volumes: zwave-config: name: zwave-config

file.name: ESPHome
file.body: services: esphome: container_name: esphome image: ghcr.io/esphome/esphome:latest volumes: # Map a local directory to the container's /config for persistent storage of your YAML files and firmware - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/esphome/config:/config:rw # Ensure correct local time within the container - /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro # Use host network mode for better mDNS/device discovery (recommended for Linux hosts) network_mode: host # Or, if 'network_mode: host' is not available (e.g., on macOS or Windows), use ports and enable ping status # ports: # - "6052:6052" # environment: # - ESPHOME_DASHBOARD_USE_PING=true restart: always # 'privileged: true' might be needed if you plan to flash devices via USB from within the container # privileged: true

file.name: uptime-kuma
file.body: --- # Date: 2025-06-01 # https://github.com/louislam/uptime-kuma services: uptime-kuma: image: louislam/uptime-kuma:2 container_name: uptime-kuma dns: - 192.168.1.154 volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/uptime-kuma/config:/app/data #- CHANGE_TO_COMPOSE_DATA_PATH/uptime-kuma/data:/app/data ports: - 3003:3001 # Host Port:Container Port restart: unless-stopped

file.name: Code Server
file.body: --- services: code-server: image: lscr.io/linuxserver/code-server:latest container_name: code-server environment: - PUID=1000 - PGID=100 - TZ=America/New_York - AUTH=none #- CS_DISABLE_GETTING_STARTED_OVERRIDE=true #- PASSWORD=SaveSomeDollars2# #optional #- HASHED_PASSWORD= #optional #- SUDO_PASSWORD=SaveSomeDollars2# #optional #- SUDO_PASSWORD_HASH= #optional - PROXY_DOMAIN=dev.zeusis.homes #optional - DEFAULT_WORKSPACE=/appdata #optional - PWA_APPNAME=code-server #optional dns: - 192.168.1.154 volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/code-server/config:/config - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata:/appdata ports: - 8443:8443 restart: unless-stopped

file.name: dozzle
file.body: --- # Date: 2025-06-01 # https://hub.docker.com/r/amir20/dozzle # https://dozzle.dev/ services: dozzle: container_name: dozzle image: amir20/dozzle:latest volumes: - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro #- /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock ports: - 8889:8080 environment: - TZ=America/New_York restart: unless-stopped

file.name: Transmute
file.body:
services: transmute: image: ghcr.io/transmute-app/transmute:latest container_name: transmute restart: unless-stopped ports: - 3313:3313 volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/transmute_data:/app/data healthcheck: test: - "CMD" - "wget" - "-q" - "-O" - "/dev/null" - "--tries=1" - "http://localhost:3313/api/health/ready" interval: 30s timeout: 10s retries: 3 start_period: 40s
volumes: transmute_data:

file.name: metube
file.body: services: metube: image: ghcr.io/alexta69/metube container_name: metube restart: unless-stopped environment: - PUID=1000 - PGID=100 - TZ=America/New_York #- DOWNLOAD_DIR=/downloads/video #- AUDIO_DOWNLOAD_DIR=/downloads/audio - STATE_DIR=/downloads/.metube - TEMP_DIR=/downloads/.tmp - YTDL_OPTIONS={"postprocessors":[{"key":"FFmpegExtractAudio","preferredcodec":"mp3","preferredquality":"192"}]} dns: - 192.168.1.154 ports: - "8097:8081" volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/metube/downloads:/downloads

file.name: invidious
file.body:
services: invidious: image: quay.io/invidious/invidious:latest container_name: invidious restart: unless-stopped ports: - "0.0.0.0:3006:3000" environment: INVIDIOUS_CONFIG: | db: dbname: invidious user: kemal password: supersecretpassword host: invidious-db port: 5432 check_tables: true invidious_companion: - private_url: "http://companion:8282/companion" invidious_companion_key: "ec3b6627bd9b59df" hmac_key: "21dd65a91efe4aee" depends_on: - invidious-db - companion healthcheck: test: wget -nv --tries=1 --spider http://127.0.0.1:3006/api/v1/stats || exit 1 interval: 30s timeout: 5s retries: 2
companion: image: quay.io/invidious/invidious-companion:latest container_name: companion restart: unless-stopped environment: SERVER_SECRET_KEY: "ec3b6627bd9b59df"
invidious-db: image: postgres:14 container_name: invidious-db restart: unless-stopped environment: POSTGRES_DB: invidious POSTGRES_USER: kemal POSTGRES_PASSWORD: supersecretpassword volumes: - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/invidious/postgres:/var/lib/postgresql/data - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/invidious/config/sql:/config/sql:ro - /srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata/invidious/docker/init-invidious-db.sh:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init-invidious-db.sh:ro

globalenv.globalenv:
# THE FOLLOWING VARIABLES CAN BE USED IN ANY COMPOSE FILE # THEIR VALUE WILL BE REPLACED BY THE VALUE ASSIGNED HERE # YOU CAN ADD AS MANY VARIABLES AS YOU NEED # # # Customize the PID and GID value of your appuser user. # You can see it in the OMV GUI in the USERS > USERS tab # APPUSER_PUID=1000 APPUSER_PGID=100 # # Customize your time zone value. # You can see it in the OMV GUI in the SYSTEM > DATE & TIME tab # TIME_ZONE_VALUE=America/New_York # # In this file you can define how many paths you need for different compose files. # The following are examples corresponding to the example system in the Docker on OMV document on the omv-extras wiki. # Customize the values ​​according to your system configuration. # PATH_TO_APPDATA=/srv/dev-disk-by-uuid-60f74361-aa6c-4a40-9ebf-f77d344204d3/appdata
# Add SearX-related variables. MORTY_KEY=SaveSomeDolalrs2# SEARX_HOSTNAME=localhost LETSENCRYPT_EMAIL=internal
